title: Monday tips: Checking out the Board Views
excerpt:

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community! Charlotte here again with a monday tip for you: play around with the board views! Your default board view does not have to be the regular old table!

Think of your main table as the place to dump all the data and information you need, and your board views as the ways to display and differentiate the data so it’s easier to see and understand right away.

Here’s a video discussing the different board views SUPER briefly so you can get an idea of the use cases and value of the different types of board views.

Do you have a board view you’ve never used because you’re not quite sure how you would use it or what its value is? Let me know and I’ll make a more in-depth example or use case of that board view!

Screen Shot 2023-01-10 at 11.28.02 AM2280×1244 299 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:

Hey community! Charlotte here again with a monday tip for you: play around with the board views! Your default board view does not have to be the regular old table!

Think of your main table as the place to dump all the data and information you need, and your board views as the ways to display and differentiate the data so it’s easier to see and understand right away.

Here’s a video discussing the different board views SUPER briefly so you can get an idea of the use cases and value of the different types of board views.

Do you have a board view you’ve never used because you’re not quite sure how you would use it or what its value is? Let me know and I’ll make a more in-depth example or use case of that board view!
